name: Buckwheat Pancakes
recipeIngredient: Egg whites or 1/4 cup (cholesterol-free egg product)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites with a hand beater in a medium bowl until foamy.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, except the wheat germ, to the egg whites and mix just until smooth.
3. Spray a griddle or 10-inch skillet with nonstick cooking spray.
4. Heat the griddle over medium heat or to 375°F.
5. For each pancake, pour about 3 tablespoons of batter onto the hot griddle.
6. Cook the pancakes until they are puffed and dry around the edges.
7. Sprinkle each pancake with about 1 teaspoon of wheat germ (or wheat bran).
8. Turn the pancakes and cook the other sides until golden brown.
